# Strike Logger

AI Code Review Strike Logger - Track and categorize AI-generated code errors to prevent repeated mistakes.

## 🚀 Quick Start

```bash
npm install -g @halogen-labs/strike-logger
strike-logger init
```

## 📖 Documentation

See [README.md](README.md) for full documentation.
